form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 35 day let-up. At the latest run 3rd of 14 at this track on March 8 over 1400m, nose behind He Was Me with 61kg at $4.50. Before that favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.0 len at this track February 8 over 1400m defeating Winning Machine with 58kg at $8.10. Will appreciate the big weight drop and looks tough to hold out again.
